requirements.jd_requirement: Architect and manage secure, scalable cloud infrastructure with a strong focus on automation and efficiency
requirements.matched_skills: Secure cloud operations, IAM implementation, Containerized security services
requirements.evidence: I build and operate production cloud systems with deployable security controls—designing IAM, secrets management, and hardened ECS deployments that scale without compromising safety.

requirements.jd_requirement: Lead Infrastructure as Code (IaC) development using Terraform, Helm, and Ansible
requirements.matched_skills: Infrastructure as Code, Configuration management, CI/CD pipelines
requirements.evidence: I’ve built and maintained Terraform/Ansible-based IaC pipelines for secure cloud deployments, ensuring repeatability and auditability across environments.

requirements.jd_requirement: Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines for Kubernetes applications and traditional EC2 workloads
requirements.matched_skills: CI/CD pipelines, Automated build and deploy workflows, Release automation
requirements.evidence: I design CI/CD pipelines that unify containerized and EC2 deployments—embedding security gates, version control, and rollback capabilities for operational reliability.

requirements.jd_requirement: Implement and enhance observability solutions using DataDog, ensuring real-time monitoring and proactive issue resolution
requirements.matched_skills: Log analysis, Anomaly-oriented analysis, Security metrics and reporting
requirements.evidence: I build observability pipelines using Grafana/Prometheus and correlate signals across systems to detect anomalies early—turning telemetry into actionable alerts.

requirements.jd_requirement: Drive Kubernetes-based containerization and orchestration initiatives
requirements.matched_skills: Container orchestration, AWS ECS deployments, Service hardening
requirements.evidence: I’ve containerized legacy Java apps and deployed them on Kubernetes/ECS with hardened configurations—balancing security, scalability, and operational simplicity.

requirements.jd_requirement: Work with Kafka to design and optimize event-driven architectures
requirements.matched_skills: Multi-source ingestion, Correlation logic, Entity resolution
requirements.evidence: I’ve built event-driven pipelines using Kafka to ingest and normalize security telemetry—enabling real-time correlation and automated response.

requirements.jd_requirement: Mentor junior engineers and contribute to a culture of continuous learning
requirements.evidence: I create runbooks, architecture decision records (ADRs), and onboarding guides that scale team velocity—ensuring knowledge transfer and consistent delivery.

requirements.jd_requirement: Proficiency in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible) and scripting (Python, Bash)
requirements.matched_skills: Infrastructure as Code, Configuration management, Python automation
requirements.evidence: I write production-grade Python/Bash tooling to automate infrastructure provisioning, patching, and remediation—reducing manual effort and drift.

requirements.jd_requirement: Deep understanding of cloud networking, security, and scalability best practices
requirements.matched_skills: IAM implementation, Service hardening, Secure cloud operations
requirements.evidence: I design secure network topologies and enforce least-privilege access across AWS environments—balancing developer agility with compliance requirements.

requirements.jd_requirement: Experience with troubleshooting and optimizing large-scale cloud infrastructures
requirements.matched_skills: Operational reliability practices, CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code
requirements.evidence: I’ve led post-incident reviews and built runbooks to prevent recurrence—turning operational debt into scalable, observable infrastructure.

tone_notes: Match ModMed’s pragmatic, mission-driven tone—emphasize building secure systems that *hold up in production*, not just theoretical security. Align with their 'for doctors, by doctors' ethos by highlighting operational reliability and real-world impact over buzzwords.
summary_angle: Position Conner as a security-minded cloud engineer who builds reliable, scalable infrastructure—bridging DevOps, security automation, and cloud-native delivery to support high-stakes healthcare applications.
